sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
print("Current key objects:")
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 20 or n['color'] == 'M' or n['color'] == 'G' or (n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 12):
        print(f"  {n['color']} id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, pos={n['boundary'][0]}")

# Check if purple square and dark gray diamond are overlapping/adjacent
seg = current_frame.segmentation
adj = seg['adjacency_list']
print("\nAdjacency list (relevant pairs):")
for pair in adj:
    i, j = pair
    ni = next((n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['id'] == i), None)
    nj = next((n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['id'] == j), None)
    if ni and nj and (ni['color'] in ('p', 'G', 'M') or nj['color'] in ('p', 'G', 'M')):
        if ni['pixels'] >= 12 or nj['pixels'] >= 12:
            print(f"  {ni['color']}({ni['id']}) -- {nj['color']}({nj['id']})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
